message:
test(engine): add 64 new integration and enrichment test files

Add 46 module-specific enrichment integration tests covering serde roundtrips,
invariant assertions, and edge cases across existing engine modules. Add 8 RGC
governance tests (execution waves, milestone gatebook, risk register, verification
coverage matrix, test harness). Add 10 new-feature integration tests for static
semantics, TS module resolution parity, wave handoff contracts, lowering binding
conflicts, lowering coverage, and parser enrichment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
